description: New orders placed every bar without checking for existing open orders.
explanation: If orders from previous bars haven't filled yet, placing new orders each bar causes order accumulation. A strategy targeting 100 shares can end up with 500 pending orders after 5 bars, creating massive unintended positions when they eventually fill. This is especially dangerous for limit orders in illiquid markets.
suggested_fix: Check get_open_orders() before placing new orders. Use order_target() instead of order() to specify the desired final position rather than incremental changes.

issues.title: New orders placed without checking existing open orders
